---
pagetitle: "Publications | Jubayer Hossain"
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
callout-icon: false
---

:::  panel-tabset

# Journal Articles 
1. **Hossain, M. J.**, Islam, M. W., Munni, U. R., Gulshan, R., Mukta, S. A., Miah, M. S., Sultana, S., Karmakar, M., Ferdous, J., & Islam, M.A. (2023). Health‑related quality of life among thalassemia patients in Bangladesh using the SF‑36 questionnaire. Scientific Reports,13(1). <https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-023-34205-9>

2. Towhid, S. T., **Hossain, M. J.**, Sammo, M. A. S., & Akter, S. (2022). Perception of Students on Antibiotic Resis‑
tance and Prevention: An Online, Community‑Based Case Study from Dhaka, Bangladesh. European Journal of Biology and Biotechnology, 3(3), 14–19. <https://doi.org/10.24018/ejbio.2022.3.3.341>

3. **Hossain, M.J.**, Towhid ST, Sultana S, Mukta SA, Gulshan R, Miah MS (2022). Knowledge and Attitudes towards
Thalassemia among Public University Students in Bangladesh. Microbial Bioactives, 5(2), <https://doi.org/10.25163/microbbioacts.526325.>

# Accepted
1. **Hossain, M.J.**, Towhid, S. T., Akter, S., Shahjahan, M., Roy, T., Akter, B., & Nodee, T. A.(2023). Self‑Management of Diabetic Patients from the Urban Areas in Bangladesh.( Accepted by Microbial Bioactives, October 2022)

# Under Review

1. Islam, M.W., Shahjahan, M., Azad, A.K., **Hossain, M.J.**(2023). Factors contributing to antibiotic misuse among parents of school-going children in Dhaka City, Bangladesh. <http://dx.doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-3382034/v1> (Submitted to Scientific Reports)

2. Akter, MM., **Hossain, M.J.**(2023).Food consumption patterns and sedentary behaviours among the university students: a cross-sectional study. <http://dx.doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-3207448/v1> (Submitted to Health Science Reports)

3. **Hossain, M.J.**, Das, M.,Shahjahan, M.,Islam, M.W., Towhid, S.T.(2022).Clinical and hematological manifestation of dengue patients in 2022 outbreak: A tertiary care hospital-based study.(Submitted to Health Science Reports)

4. Munmun, RN., Bapon, PS., **Hossain, M.J.**, Das, Hasan, MK., Towhid, S.T.(2023).Detection of DEN2 NS1 Antigen and Pre-fibrinogen in Patient Serum Using ELISA from Dhaka Medical College and Hospital, Bangladesh. (Submitted to Health Science Reports)

5. **Hossain, M.J.**, Towhid, S. T., M., Islam, M. W., Shahjahan, M. (2022).The role of community participation and social engagement in the prevention and control of dengue fever in Dhaka City.(Submitted to Health Science Reports)

6. **Hossain, M.J.**, Azad,A.K.,Shahid, M.S.B., Shahjahan,M.(2022).Prevalence, Antibiotic Resistance Pattern for Bacteriuria from Patients with Urinary Tract Infections. (Submitted to Health Science Reports)

7. Akter, S., M., Islam, M. W., Shahjahan., Faria, F.T.J.,(2023).**Hossain, M.J.** Structural and Functional Analysis of Hypothetical Protein HG570_03930 of Helicobacter Pylori: An In-Silico Approach. (Submitted to Genomics \& Informatics)

8. Rafa, S., Kundu, P., Rashid, R., Bhuiyan, H., Mahima, F.F., Sarker, T., **Hossain, M.J.**(2023). In-Silico Structural and Functional Annotation of Hypothetical Protein MPF87_06725 of Helicobacter pylori.(Submitted to Genomics \& Informatics)

9. Ambia, S., Ahmed, M.Z., Faria, F.T.J., Karim, K., Fuad, M., **Hossain, M.J.**(2023). Prediction of Structure &amp; Function of Helicobacter Pylori hypothetical protein MPG40_02440: An In-Silico approach. (Submitted to Genomics \& Informatics)

10. Akter, S., M., Rahman, T., Rahman., R.U., Afsari, S., Ferdous, J., Billah, M. R., **Hossain, M.J.**(2023). In-Silico Structural and Functional Annotation of Hypothetical Glycosyltransferase Protein. (Submitted to Genomics \& Informatics)

:::
